description.description: Description of the external VPN gateway, providing context for its purpose or usage.

interface.description: Defines the network interfaces for the external VPN gateway, specifying interface IDs and associated IP addresses. Up to 8 interfaces are supported.

labels.description: Key-value pairs for organizing and categorizing the external VPN gateway; must comply with label naming conventions.

name.description: Defines the unique name for the external VPN gateway, which must be compliant with GCP naming conventions and globally unique within the project.

redundancy_type.description: Specifies the redundancy type for the external VPN gateway; must be either 'SINGLE_IP_INTERNALLY_REDUNDANT' or 'IP_REDUNDANCY_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED'.

timeouts.description: Defines the duration allowed for operations on the external VPN gateway, such as creation, update, or deletion, in order to prevent timeout errors.
